falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5000 (current level + 10%) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward breakout would contradict the 'HOLD' signal and suggest the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would indicate a confirmed market top, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and 78% similarity to a historical bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX volatility index drops below 15 (current level - 30%) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained low volatility would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by indicating complacency rather than uncertainty, contradicting the pattern's implied risk profile.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
